utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates – present and fully specified (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09).
3. transportation – present with full flight details and cost (airline, class, times, baggage, price, currency).
4. accommodation – present with full details and costs (hotel name, type, rating, location, prices, amenities).
5. activities – present with multiple activities, all have names, types, durations, prices, and currency.
6. additional_services – present with dining info and costs (restaurant, cuisine type, dietary options, prices, currency).
7. total_budget – present with breakdown and total cost. Although there is a small inconsistency (activities total 225 EUR but budget lists 75 EUR), the field is still included and specified.
Thus, all 7 items are included and fully specified according to the format requirements.
